info.title: PrivyQ Gateway
info.description: REST API for policy-governed post-quantum encryption with verifiable evidence.

post.description: Encrypt data with an embedded policy (BP App B.1).

Decrypt data if the embedded policy is satisfied (BP App B.2).

Returns 403 with the policy evaluation when access is denied.
Verify an audit evidence entry (BP App B.3).

get.description: Retrieve audit evidence for a resource/actor (BP App B.4).
List all managed keys with their status.

post.description: Generate a new key pair (BP App B.5).

get.description: Get public key info by id (BP App B; closes v1 gap B6).

post.description:
Evaluate a policy against an identity/context — no side effects.

Powers the interactive policy playground; runs the core's real policy engine.

The PDP decision — can this identity access this? No data revealed.

Any service can call this to enforce the same policies consistently.
Human-readable reason for a decision (great for 403 bodies, debugging, UX).
Post-quantum signature over data (the v2 seal() verb).

get.description: Export the evidence trail as json | csv | pdf for compliance.
Map the evidence trail onto GDPR/HIPAA/SOC2 controls.
Service health, including core reachability (BP App B.7).
